body.title: [sprint] DickSimnelShim tests pass worker_callback= kwarg its __init__ no longer accepts (6 red)
body.description:
tests/test_dsimnel_launcher.py::TestDickSimnelShimSemaphore constructs DickSimnelShim(worker_callback=...) but __init__ no longer takes that kwarg -> TypeError, 6 red. Pre-existing at HEAD (verified via clean worktree during T-collapse-daemons-to-ground-loop; NOT caused by it). Reconcile the test to the current DickSimnelShim signature (or restore the param if it was dropped in error).

**Affected files:** tests/test_dsimnel_launcher.py; unseen_university/devices/dicksimnel/shim.py (read to confirm the real signature).
**Design rules:** device-shim-contract; test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** only reconcile the shim constructor signature vs its tests; no behavior change to dispatch.
**Test plan:** tests/test_dsimnel_launcher.py green in-session.
**Intention:** I intend the DickSimnel shim tests exercise the real constructor so they give a trustworthy signal.

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
